---
title: "Articles, Presentations, and Projects"
listing:
  - id: research
    contents: "*/index.qmd"
    sort:
      - "date desc"
      - "title"
    template: ../html/research/listing.ejs
    categories: unnumbered
page-layout: full
include-back-link: false
toc-location: right
---

::: {#research}
:::
